tools.name: query_constitution
tools.description: Execute a SPARQL query against the South African Constitution knowledge graph. Converts natural language questions to SPARQL.

sparql_query.description: The SPARQL query string to execute (e.g., 'SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s a saont:Section }')

tools.name: get_section_text
tools.description: Retrieve the full legal text of a specific section or provision by its identifier.

tools.name: find_sections_by_keyword
tools.description: Search for sections or provisions that contain a specific keyword in their legal text.
